title: NY
text:
Cleaned DATA file: DATA_Students,Teachers.csv
SOURCE DATA, Steps to Clean and Create the Clean DATA file:
1 - Download the Source Data:
a) “YYYY-YY_Admin_Comp_Data.xlsx” from: (has #admins and salaries) b) XXX.xlsx, from https://www.p12.nysed.gov/irs/pmf/ or expenditures (has #teachers)
c) ReportCardDatabase-Expenditures per pupil (has #students, and matches the report card data info used to calculated perPupil info)
or dis_by_county2025.xlsx (has #student with disabilities and classifications
2 - Update and Run this R Script, in the same directory: Clean_Students,Teachers.R

title: Open School Data (NY)
text:
This website contains plots and visualizations of public data related to student literacy outcomes in our NY public schools.
These plots are used on OpenSchoolData.com, a website to help identify issues contributing to inequitable students outcomes and overspending in our schools.
If you’d like to contribute, and care more about improving equity and student outcomes over profiting off of them, your ideas and contributions are welcome!

title: NY
text:
Cleaned DATA file: DATA_ELA-SPRING-YYYY.csv
SOURCE DATA, Steps to Clean and Create the Clean DATA file:
1 - Download the Source Data, the “Report Card Database” from here: https://data.nysed.gov/downloads.php, into a folder named: SRCYYYY
2 - Update and Run this R Script, in the same directory: Clean_ELA_ANYYEAR-filePerSeason.R
